title: Filterable Trait Parameters
description: Controls multi-facet filtering behavior in list and collection views.

filterMode.description: Controls when filter changes take effect: immediate (on change) or batch (on apply).

maxActiveFilters.description: Maximum number of simultaneous active filters. 0 means unlimited.

showFilterCount.description: Whether to display a badge showing the number of active filters.

collapsible.description: Whether filter panel sections can be collapsed individually.
